settings.title: Book Your Spring Checkup Before the Summer Rush
settings.excerpt: May and June are our busiest months, so an April booking gets you the appointment time you actually want.
settings.body:
Every year the same thing happens. People remember their checkup in late June, just as families try to sort their teeth before the summer holidays, and the diary is already full.

May and June are reliably our busiest months. By the time the sun is out, the appointments people actually want, early mornings and after school, are long gone.

Why spring is the easy time

If you are due, now is the easy time. A spring slot means more choice of times and no scramble before you travel. You book the time that suits your week, not the only one left.

It is also a good moment to catch small problems while they are still small. A tiny cavity found in April is a quick filling. Left until autumn it can become something larger, and a good deal less pleasant to fix.

A simple spring list

While you are thinking about it, a few things worth booking before the rush:

  • Your own six-monthly checkup.
  • The children's checkups, before the school year ends.
  • Any cleaning you have been putting off since winter.

Call the front desk or book online and we will find you a time that works. A few minutes now saves the June phone call where we can only offer you a slot in July.
